summary: #41256 remains the live canonical issue. Current main still drops Discord upload MIME types and still optimizes non-GIF image media through the shared web-media path. #41265 is the active linked implementation candidate, but it is read-only overlap context for this job and carries merge-risk labels, failing proof/checks, and unresolved bot review findings, so this worker should not emit merge or executable repair actions without maintainer override.

actions.reason: Canonical issue remains open and the reported bug is still present on current main.

#41265 is related as the active linked implementation candidate for #41256, but this cluster cannot mutate or repair it because it is excluded overlap context and has high-risk labels plus unresolved review/check blockers.
Closed historical same-root PR; evidence only.

Maintainer decision needed: either explicitly adopt/override repair of #41265 despite overlap and merge-risk labels, or spawn a separate narrow fix job that is allowed to carry contributor credit without using the blocked PR as executable lineage.

needs_human: Decide whether Clownfish may adopt and repair #41265 despite existing-overlap scope, merge-risk labels, failing proof/checks, and unresolved bot findings, or whether a new explicitly authorized narrow fix job should replace it while preserving @skidder credit.
